title: Poor handling of informing people of their subscription and where to find out information about it
content:
Hi,

I subscribed to what I thought was a year plan for 39.99 and a 6 day trial. It did not let me know before the trail was over so I couldn’t cancel it. I was going to keep it but then discovered that it was 39.99 per month not 39.99 for the entire year. This was very misleading. When I tried to go into your app to see my subscription detail I could not find it any where. 

I would like a refund of the money that was taken out of my account. And I have already cancelled my subscription

I used to use this app for free all the time and now suddenly I HAVE to pay or use a free trial? This is very disheartening. Please cancel my trial and cancel the payment so I don’t get charged. Thanks. Also wanted to just contact support for this but kept getting flagged as “spam” so yeah.

author: sweet_milky

title: The Best Workout App in the World
content: Update, June 24, 2026 - I’ve been using this app for a while and I like it even more than when I started.  One of the rare and fantastic things about the workouts is that they are genuinely well thought out, really nicely put together.  It seems a person sat down and thought this through and put the exercises in the right order and the most beneficial exercises.  So, there are no surprises.  The workouts do what they say they will do.  Anyway, I do wish they’d put out some new PROGRAMS, though I’m sure at some point they will.   ———-         I am absolutely crazy about this app.  It has everything, almost (no tai chi, yet).  All types of exercises and yoga . . . Of various lengths.  I am on a 30 day dumbbell program right now.  The variety of exercises in that one program is amazing.  I’ve never seen some of those moves.  Also, doing a 7-minute workout in the morning; love those unique moves, too.  Basically, you get this and you don’t need anything else.  I downloaded dozens of workout apps and this is the one who stood out way, way above the others; nothing even compares. Totally love it!
author: Dawn30000

title: Good but why subscription??!!😭

Though I do suggest getting younger ages below 18 because some girls who want to change and get a bit healthier in 6th grade or older can be a better version of themselves.

author: Yuri GHP

title: Great app!
content: I started using this app when I was in the Marines and am now using it postpartum! I still love it! I have purchased the membership a couple times with breaks in between. So I like how convenient it is to be able to take a break. No match for an expensive gym membership. I prefer this for its simplicity and motivational content. I can work around my babies naps now that I’m almost a year postpartum. I’m also easing my body back into movement by doing the postpartum recovery plan! There’s so many options. And I have a bad back and knee problem, along with shoulder issues too. Just need to listen to your body. Check it out!!
author: Brendaaaa :)
